_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of BI governance practices, including report certification, content lifecycle management, access control, and version control for BI assets.
comments: NICE knowledge intersects with WIDAI AB domain. Knowledge AB-K-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-K-006 (AB, cosine: 0.548), LS-K-007 (LS, cosine: 0.540).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.3/10 (raw 0.531). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. NICE-only terms [analysis, bia, business, impact] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, assets, bi, certification, content, control] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.822 (P=0.823, R=0.821). Balanced P/R — the 6-word NICE element and 19-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Knowledge of Business Impact Analysis (BIA)" and "Knowledge of BI governance practices, including report certification, content li" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.562 ≈ STS 0.531 (gap 0.030). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [knowledge] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.5%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. NICE-only: [analysis, bia, business, impact]. WIDAI-only: [access, assets, bi, certification, content, control].

signals.detail: STS 0.531 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
